title: BOLSIUS Earthy Orange Rustic Shine Pillar Candle 13cm x 7cm
features: Inspired by Nature: Design and Color
description of bullet point 1: This Bolsius pillar candle, in earthy orange, is inspired by the colors and textures of nature, bringing a touch of the outdoors into your home.
description of bullet point 2: Made with plant-based wax and a cotton wick, this unscented candle is free from palm oil or animal fat, making it an environmentally responsible choice.
Long Burning Time and Large Flame
description of bullet point 3: With a large flame and soft light, this 13cm x 6.8cm pillar candle provides an extended burn time, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.
Modern Style and Suitable for All Seasons
description of bullet point 4: The modern style of this orange pillar candle makes it a perfect fit for any home decor, and its unscented feature ensures it's suitable for all seasons.
description: Product description About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 13cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented Safety Warning Cut the fuse, protect the surface and avoid draughts
